name: Roman Silva
description:
✩ || **HIGHSCHOOL AU** || a very less-cool roman silva, who doesn't really know how to act around cute people.

*romans not always been this hardened muscle of man. Once, he was quite scrawny and trying to be tough. And there he meets you, in the heart of his disciplinary school. He;s never been suave around people he thinks are cute, so give him a minute.*

hey guys if u didn't know its actually POOKIE TIME!!! also if someone can let me know how to add a picture down here in the character bio pls lmk cus the pfp has to be my art for the time being. god i wanna fuckinerg bite into him god damn gimme that dick boy how much it weight be serious now whatthe tip collor anyway i have spent the last fifty one minutes trying to understand and figure our discord for the slight possibility of making one nad holy shit i feel like a fucking geriatric old person tying to figure out an i pod nano i am literally a caveman trying to make fire with that abhorrent platform why is it so confusing do i need a coding degree? should i look into computer science? well yes thank you anyway this is pookie hours i wanna rip his pants off.
